---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: ['enhancement', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''

---

## Feature Description
**Briefly describe the feature you'd like to see:**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem/Need
**What problem does this feature solve?**
Describe the problem or need this feature addresses. Is your feature request related to a problem?

## Proposed Solution
**Describe the solution you'd like:**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions
**Describe alternatives you've considered:**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## User Stories
**Describe how this feature would be used:**
- As a [user type], I want [functionality] so that [benefit]
- As a [user type], I want [functionality] so that [benefit]

## Acceptance Criteria
**Define what "done" looks like:**
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Mockups/Designs (Optional)
**If you have any mockups, wireframes, or design ideas, include them here:**

## Technical Considerations
**Any technical requirements or constraints:**
- Performance requirements
- Security considerations
- Integration requirements
- Compatibility needs

## Priority/Impact
**How important is this feature?**
- [ ] Critical - Blocks major functionality
- [ ] High - Significantly improves user experience
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have improvement
- [ ] Low - Minor enhancement

## Affected Components
**Which parts of the system would this affect?**
- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Database Schema
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Security/Authentication
- [ ] CI/CD Pipeline
- [ ] Documentation

## Success Metrics
**How would we measure success of this feature?**
- Metric 1: [e.g., 95% user satisfaction]
- Metric 2: [e.g., 50% reduction in support tickets]
- Metric 3: [e.g., 20% improvement in performance]

## Phase/Release Target
**When would you like to see this feature?**
- [ ] Phase 1 (Current MVP)
- [ ] Phase 2 (Enhanced features)
- [ ] Phase 3 (Advanced capabilities)
- [ ] Future consideration

## Dependencies
**Does this feature depend on other features or systems?**
List any dependencies or blockers.

## Risks/Concerns
**Any potential risks or concerns with this feature?**
- Security implications
- Performance impact
- Compatibility issues
- Development complexity

## Additional Context
**Add any other context, research, or resources:**
- Links to related issues
- External references
- User feedback
- Market research

---

**For Team Use:**
- **Estimated Effort**: [ ] XS (1-2 days) [ ] S (1 week) [ ] M (2-3 weeks) [ ] L (1 month) [ ] XL (2+ months)
- **Business Value**: [ ] High [ ] Medium [ ] Low
- **Technical Risk**: [ ] High [ ] Medium [ ] Low
- **Azure DevOps Epic**: [Link to ADO epic]
